hints.description: This company operates as a travel technology platform, providing a wide range of services including booking hotels, flights, rental cars, cruises, and activities. It owns and operates numerous well-known travel brands like Hotels.com, Orbitz, Travelocity, and Vrbo. CEO Peter Kern spearheaded a significant shift towards focusing on advertising and technology solutions within the travel industry.
hints.funFact1: Originally founded in 1996 as a division of Microsoft, the company was spun off as an independent entity in 1999. Barry Diller played a crucial role in its early development and eventual independence.
hints.funFact2: The company’s portfolio includes over 20 brands, operating in over 75 countries and with websites and apps available in over 35 languages, making it a truly global player in the travel sector.
